solution.official_verdict: Rajesh and Nupur Talwar were convicted in 2013 by CBI court, then acquitted by Allahabad High Court in 2017 due to insufficient evidence. The case remains officially unsolved.
solution.victim_cause_of_death: Sharp-edged weapon trauma to the head and neck

entities.name: Aarushi Talwar
entities.description: 14-year-old girl found dead in her bedroom with her throat slit on the morning of May 16, 2008.

entities.name: Hemraj Banjade
entities.description: 45-year-old Nepali domestic helper. Initially reported missing. Body found on the terrace 2 days later.

entities.name: Dr. Rajesh Talwar
entities.description: Father of Aarushi. Dentist. Filed the initial FIR naming Hemraj as suspect before Hemraj's body was found.

entities.name: Dr. Nupur Talwar
entities.description: Mother of Aarushi. Dentist. Was in the house on the night of the murder.

entities.name: Jalvayu Vihar, Sector 25, Noida
entities.description: L-32, Jalvayu Vihar apartment complex. Aarushi's bedroom was on the 2nd floor. Hemraj's body was on the terrace.

entities.name: Krishna Thadarai
entities.description: Domestic helper who worked for a neighbour. Had keys to the Talwar household. Underwent narco-analysis.

entities.name: Rajkumar
entities.description: Domestic helper who worked nearby. Was a drinking companion of Hemraj.

entities.name: Vijay Mandal
entities.description: Another domestic helper. Companion of Hemraj, implicated by narco-analysis but not by physical evidence.

entities.name: Murder Weapon — Kukri / Khukri
entities.description: A sharp-edged weapon consistent with scalpel-like precision. Exact weapon never recovered.

entities.name: Terrace Door Lock
entities.description: The terrace door was locked from the inside. The outer lock was missing. Raises question of how the killer accessed the terrace.

entities.name: Phone Records
entities.description: Rajesh Talwar's phone records show a late-night internet session. Aarushi's phone was found switched off.

entities.name: Crime Scene Contamination
entities.description: Noida Police failed to seal the crime scene. Multiple people walked through before forensics arrived. Key evidence may have been destroyed.

entities.name: Narco-Analysis Test Results
entities.description: Krishna, Rajkumar, and Vijay Mandal were subjected to narco-analysis. Results suggested familiarity with the crime but are not admissible in court.

entities.name: CBI Takes Over
entities.description: CBI took over the case from Noida Police. Initially pursued the servant theory, later closed it and charged parents.

entities.name: Honour Killing Theory
entities.description: CBI alleged parents killed Aarushi after finding her in a compromising position with Hemraj. Talwars denied this vehemently.

rajesh-talwar.persona: Dr. Rajesh Talwar. Father of Aarushi. Dentist. You discovered your daughter's body. You are grieving and feel falsely accused by both police and media.
rajesh-talwar.knowledge_boundary: You know what happened inside the house that night from your perspective. You went to sleep around 11:30 PM. You claim you found Aarushi's body at 6 AM. You do NOT know who killed her.

contradictions.claim: I went to sleep around 11:30 PM and heard nothing
contradictions.confrontation_prompt: Phone records show your router was active until 12:07 AM. Why were you online after you say you went to sleep?

nupur-talwar.persona: Dr. Nupur Talwar. Mother of Aarushi. Dentist. You are devastated by the loss of your daughter and outraged at being suspected.
nupur-talwar.knowledge_boundary: You were asleep on the night of the murder. You claim to have heard nothing. You do NOT know who killed Aarushi.

krishna.persona: Krishna Thadarai. Domestic helper. You worked for Dr. Aarushi's neighbour. You sometimes visited Hemraj. You are frightened of the police.
krishna.knowledge_boundary: You know Hemraj socially. You claim you were at your employer's house that night. You underwent narco-analysis.

contradictions.claim: I was at my employer's house the whole night
contradictions.confrontation_prompt: Narco-analysis results suggest you have knowledge of the crime scene layout. How do you explain this?
